_comment: Example findings-graph for a NEW host (schema: ../schema/work-item.schema.json). Copy the shape into state/findings-graph.json, replace the items with your own audit findings / stories, then run: node <mount>/_workflow/driver.mjs init. Every field below is real — ids must match ^[A-Z0-9]+(-[A-Z0-9]+)+$, dependsOn refers to other item ids, files[] is the file-lock set, acceptance is the checkable done-criterion the gates enforce, regressionTest describes the red->green proof the test-author must deliver.

items.title: Health endpoint doc claims /healthz but the service maps /health
items.acceptance: README documents the actual mapped route (/health) and the probe example curls it successfully.
items.regressionTest: Doc-claims lint: the phantom-path check fails on old README (references a route no code maps) and passes after the fix.

items.title: Pagination skip overflows int for page >= ~21.5M (negative OFFSET -> 500)
items.acceptance: page/pageSize are clamped before Skip/Take; skip arithmetic is computed in a wider type; hostile page=2147483647 returns 200 with an empty page, never a 500.
items.regressionTest: New test requests page=int.MaxValue: FAILS on old code (provider throw / 500), PASSES after the clamp.
items.fixHint: Clamp page >= 1, bound pageSize, compute skip in long and clamp into int range.

items.title: Order lookup trusts client-supplied tenant id (cross-tenant read)
items.acceptance: Tenant id derives from the caller's claims only; a request for another tenant's order returns 403/404, proven against a REAL database (not an in-memory provider).
items.regressionTest: Integration test authenticates as tenant A and requests tenant B's order id: FAILS (200 + foreign data) on old code, PASSES (403/404) after the fix; test prints FACTORY::REALINFRA::Testcontainers-postgres when its container is up.
